title: Kofi and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: Little Kofi discovers a crying baby elephant in the savanna and helps reunite him with his family through a heartwarming adventure filled with animal friends.

pages.text: Kofi loved playing in the golden grass near his home. The warm sun made everything glow like honey. Birds chirped happy songs in the acacia trees.

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes running through golden savanna grass under warm orange sunset light, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi playing in golden savanna grass

pages.text: Suddenly, Kofi heard a sad sound. "Waaaah! Waaaah!" It came from behind a big baobab tree. Kofi's bright eyes grew wide with worry.

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes looking concerned toward a large baobab tree, warm savanna colors with textured painterly golden grass and orange sunset, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi looking worried toward a baobab tree

pages.text: Behind the tree sat a tiny baby elephant! Tears rolled down his gray cheeks. "I can't find my mama," he sniffled. "I'm all alone!"

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes kneeling beside a small crying elephant, warm savanna colors with expressive animals, textured painterly style with golden grass and orange sunset, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi comforting a crying baby elephant

pages.text: "Don't cry," said Kofi gently. "I'll help you find your mama!" The baby elephant looked up hopefully. "Really? You would do that for me?"

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes smiling warmly at the baby elephant, warm savanna colors with expressive animals, textured painterly golden grass background, orange sunset lighting, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi promising to help the baby elephant

pages.text: They walked together through the tall grass. A wise old giraffe stretched his long neck down. "Hello, little ones. The elephant herd went to the watering hole," he said kindly.

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking with baby elephant while a tall giraffe bends down to speak to them, warm savanna colors with expressive animals, textured painterly style, golden grass and orange sunset, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Giraffe giving directions to Kofi and baby elephant

pages.text: A colorful parrot flew overhead. "Follow the river!" she squawked. "Hurry, hurry! The elephants are drinking water and playing in the mud!"

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes pointing up at a bright parrot flying above, baby elephant beside him, warm savanna colors with expressive animals, textured painterly golden grass, orange sunset sky, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Parrot showing the way to Kofi and baby elephant

pages.text: At the watering hole, they heard happy trumpeting sounds. "MAMA!" cried the baby elephant, running as fast as his little legs could carry him.

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watching as baby elephant runs toward water, warm savanna colors with textured painterly golden grass, orange sunset reflecting on water, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Baby elephant running toward the watering hole

pages.text: A big mama elephant wrapped her trunk around her baby. "Oh, my little one! I was so worried!" She looked at Kofi with grateful eyes. "Thank you for helping my baby."

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes smiling as mama elephant hugs baby elephant with her trunk, warm savanna colors with expressive animals, textured painterly style by watering hole, golden grass and orange sunset, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Mama elephant reuniting with her baby while Kofi watches happily

pages.text: The elephant family trumpeted joyfully. Kofi waved goodbye as they splashed in the water. His heart felt warm knowing he had helped a friend find his way home.

illustration.description: Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes waving at elephant family playing in watering hole, warm savanna colors with expressive animals splashing, textured painterly golden grass, beautiful orange sunset, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi waving goodbye to the happy elephant family

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What did Kofi hear behind the baobab tree?
questions.explanation: Kofi heard a sad crying sound from the baby elephant who was lost and looking for his mama.

questions.question: Who told Kofi where the elephants went?
questions.explanation: The wise old giraffe stretched his long neck down and told them the elephant herd went to the watering hole.

questions.question: How did the mama elephant thank Kofi?
choices: she looked at him with grateful eyes
questions.explanation: The mama elephant looked at Kofi with grateful eyes and said thank you for helping her baby.

questions.question: Where did the elephant family reunite?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant found his family at the watering hole where they were drinking water and playing in the mud.
